channel.title: BlackRoad OS Blog
channel.description: Engineering insights on edge AI, distributed infrastructure, mesh networking, and sovereign computing.

item.title: 52 TOPS on $400: Running AI Inference at the Edge
item.dc:creator: Alexa Amundson
item.description: How we built a distributed AI inference cluster with two Hailo-8 accelerators, five Raspberry Pis, and a custom mesh network — delivering 52 trillion operations per second for under $400 in hardware.

item.title: Building a Carrier-Grade Mesh Network on Raspberry Pis
item.dc:creator: Alexa Amundson
item.description: RoadNet: 5 access points, 5 subnets, WireGuard failover, Pi-hole DNS — a real carrier network running on $35 boards.

item.title: Self-Healing Infrastructure: When Your Servers Fix Themselves
item.dc:creator: Alexa Amundson
item.description: Autonomy scripts, heartbeat monitors, and automatic service recovery — how we eliminated 3am pages.

item.title: Designing a Programming Language for AI Agents
item.dc:creator: Alexa Amundson
item.description: Why existing languages fail for agent orchestration, and how RoadC solves it with Python-style indentation and first-class concurrency.

item.title: The Sovereign Computing Manifesto
item.dc:creator: Alexa Amundson
item.description: Your infrastructure should answer to you. Not a cloud provider. Not a vendor. You.
